core_concept: 一個尋找故事的靈魂在陰森場景中探索
composition_hint: 使用對角線構圖強調空間的孤獨感與未知的探索方向
potential_subjects: A shadowy figure searching through dusty books
A flickering light revealing hidden cracks in the wall
A mysterious reflection in a cracked mirror
A hand reaching out from the shadows
original_excerpt:
Please feel free to link your creepypastas in the comments of this post and I will read them, a few of them will be narrated on my main channel Soulz Studios.
Credits will be given on the authors of all the selected stories and the narrations will be linked on your fandom account, please tell me on whether you are ok with the video being monetized or not on my account or in the comments.
Rules:
1: Minimal gore and blood
2: No sexual NSFW stories
3: Minimal mature language such as swear words
